behavior: Reestimate a task and revise its remaining hours accordingly; The task mus be estimated before calling this use case.

input.name: estimatedHours
input.note: non-null, 支援小數如 '0.5', '1.5', 內部使用 BigDecimal

method: ProductBacklogItem.reestimateTask(TaskId taskId, EstimatedHours estimatedHours, reason String)
domainModelNotes: requireNotNull("Task ID is not null", ()-> taskId)
requireNotNull("Estimated Hours is not null", ()-> estimatedHours)
require("Task is not estimated", ()-> task.estimatedHours != null)
ensure("Remaining hours must be non-negative", () -> task.remainingHours >= 0));
ensure("Remaining hours rebased", () -> task.remainingHours = max (estimatedHours - oldEstimatedHours, 0));

details.implementation: Created ReestimateTask use case with proper error handling, domain event emission, and remaining hours recalculation logic
details.domainEventChanges: Modified TaskReestimated event to use 'reason' field instead of 'strategy' for better semantics
details.remainingHoursCalculation: Implemented formula: newRemainingHours = oldRemainingHours + (newEstimatedHours - oldEstimatedHours), ensuring non-negative result

results.testResults: All 6 test scenarios passing: successful reestimation, smaller estimation, without reason, non-estimated task failure, non-existent PBI failure, non-existent task failure
